description_long: This is a small, plump bird with a rounded body and soft, downy feathers in a pale yellowish-tan color. Its head is proportionally large with a short, conical beak and dark, round eyes set on either side. The wings are small and tucked closely against the body, with subtle feather detailing visible along the edges. The legs are thin and pinkish, ending in three forward-facing toes and one rear toe, each tipped with small claws. The tail is short and rounded, blending smoothly into the body. The overall appearance suggests a young chick, likely a domestic species commonly found in urban parks or gardens.
description: A small, plump, pale yellow chick with a rounded body, short beak, and pink legs. Its soft, downy feathers and compact form give it a youthful appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bird's rounded head, short beak, and both eyes facing forward, with legs and feet visible beneath the body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bird's plump body, tucked wing, and the profile of its head and beak.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad, rounded back and tail, with both legs visible and wings folded against the body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the bird's profile, tucked wing, and the shape of its head and beak.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid pale yellow with subtle shading
